title: EXCEART 100pcs Wood Buttons Mixed Craft, Assorted Color, 2.5x2.5x0.1cm, Synthetic Materials, Christmas Tree Shape, Button, for Sewing DIY Craft, Card Making Embellishments, Christmas Decor
features: Festive Christmas Design: These wooden buttons feature unique 2-hole cartoon shapes with classic Christmas motifs, perfect for adding a seasonal touch to your Christmas embellishments for craft projects

Natural Wooden Material: Made from quality wood measuring approximately 1 inch (2.5cm) in diameter and 0.04 inches (1mm) thick, these buttons offer a lightweight yet sturdy option ideal for Christmas buttons and wooden Christmas shapes

Versatile Crafting Applications: Designed for various uses including sewing, card making, scrapbooking, and knitting, these small Christmas buttons for crafting provide a creative option for your Christmas art buttons collection

Ample Quantity for Projects: Supplied in packs of 100 pieces, these candy cane buttons and wooden Christmas buttons small size ensure you have enough embellishments for multiple Christmas craft projects or decorations

Customisable and DIY Friendly: the plain wooden base allows easy personalisation with paints or markers, enabling you to create unique styles tailored to your festive craft needs using wooden buttons 20mm
description: Description This set includes 100pcs wooden christmas buttons, each measuring approximately 1 inch in diameter and 0.04 inch thick.Crafted from wood, these decorative buttons feature charming christmas-themed designs such as gingerbread men, reindeer, and festive hats.Ideal for various crafting projects, they are perfect for christmas card making supplies, sewing, knitting, scrapbooking, and other diy activities.Their small size and two-hole design make them easy to sew onto coats, sweaters, or holiday decorations.Use these christmas craft buttons to add a unique, festive touch to your handmade presents, seasonal garments, or home décor.The mixed styles allow for creative design, making them suitable for personalising christmas decorations or enhancing holiday-themed crafts.These christmas buttons for crafting are a practical addition to any crafter collection, suitable for both adults and children during festive seasons and family gatherings.
